welcome.title: Welcome to Candle AI
welcome.desc: Confluence-powered market analysis. Get started in seconds:
welcome.step1: Search for a ticker (e.g., AAPL, BTC-USD, SPY)
welcome.step2: Select a timeframe from the top bar
welcome.step4: View the confluence score — AI narration is optional

chart.selectTicker: Select a ticker to display chart

llm.apiKeyRequired: Cloud providers require an API key. Get one from your provider's dashboard and paste it above.
llm.localInfo: Tip: Run a local model with llama.cpp (server) or Ollama. Use http://localhost:PORT/v1 as the base URL.
llm.localInProductionWarning: Local provider detected. To use Ollama/llama.cpp from this website, run it locally with CORS enabled: set OLLAMA_ORIGINS=* (or use a public tunnel like ngrok). Direct localhost calls are allowed by browsers.

pattern.title: Patterns
pattern.dojiDesc: Indecision candle — potential reversal at trend extremes
pattern.hammerDesc: Bullish reversal after downtrend — long lower shadow rejects selling
pattern.shootingStarDesc: Bearish reversal after uptrend — long upper shadow rejects buying
pattern.bullishEngulfingDesc: Green candle engulfs prior red — buyers overwhelm sellers
pattern.bearishEngulfingDesc: Red candle engulfs prior green — sellers overwhelm buyers
pattern.morningStarDesc: 3-candle bullish reversal — gap down, indecision, strong recovery
pattern.eveningStarDesc: 3-candle bearish reversal — gap up, indecision, strong decline
pattern.bullishHaramiDesc: Small green inside large red — selling momentum exhausted
pattern.bearishHaramiDesc: Small red inside large green — buying momentum exhausted
pattern.threeWhiteSoldiersDesc: Three strong green candles — sustained bullish advance
pattern.threeBlackCrowsDesc: Three strong red candles — sustained bearish decline
pattern.doubleTopDesc: Two peaks at same resistance — failed breakout = bearish reversal
pattern.doubleBottomDesc: Two troughs at same support — failed breakdown = bullish reversal
pattern.headAndShouldersDesc: Three peaks with higher middle — trend exhaustion and reversal
pattern.inverseHeadAndShouldersDesc: Three troughs with lower middle — selling exhaustion and reversal

analysis.title: AI Analysis
analysis.empty: Click "Run Analysis" to get AI-powered insights.

followUp.title: Follow-up Questions
followUp.maxMessages: Max messages reached. Clear chat to continue.

desc.regimeBase: Base rate from regime classification (ADX={{adx}}, SMA={{sma}}, Structure={{structure}})
desc.regimeNoData: No regime data — neutral base rate (50% bullish). All signals scored with neutral context.
desc.noDirection: No directional volume signal — slight reduce
desc.vixExtreme: VIX > 30 — fear dominates technicals, all signals neutralized (log-LR × 0.5)
desc.vixHigh: VIX 20-30 — elevated fear, signals moderately reduced
desc.vixLow: VIX < 12 — complacency, trends likely to persist (slight boost)
desc.dxyForex: Forex major — DXY inverse structural relationship ({{logLR}} logLR)

smc.bosBullish: Bullish BOS: broke above swing high ${{price}}
smc.bosBearish: Bearish BOS: broke below swing low ${{price}}
smc.chochBearish: Bearish CHoCH: uptrend broke structure at ${{price}}
smc.chochBullish: Bullish CHoCH: downtrend broke structure at ${{price}}
smc.sweepBullish: Bullish sweep: liquidity grab below ${{price}}, closed above
smc.sweepBearish: Bearish sweep: liquidity grab above ${{price}}, closed below

export.title: Export Pine Script
export.tip: Tip: To show oscillators (RSI, MACD) in a separate pane, copy them into a new indicator with overlay=false and remove display=display.none.
